GET /twitter/user/followings.heading_zh: 获取用户关注列表 GET /twitter/user/followings
GET /twitter/user/followings.desc_en: List the accounts a given user follows, identified by screen name, with cursor pagination and a configurable page size.
GET /twitter/user/followings.description_zh: 按用户名获取某个用户所关注的账号列表，支持游标翻页与可配置的每页数量。

GET /twitter/user/mentions.heading_zh: 获取提及用户的推文 GET /twitter/user/mentions
GET /twitter/user/mentions.desc_en: List tweets that mention a given user by screen name, in reverse-chronological order, optionally bounded by a time window and paginated with the cursor.
GET /twitter/user/mentions.description_zh: 按用户名获取提及该用户的推文，按时间倒序排列，可选用时间窗口限定范围并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/user/check_follow_relations.desc_en: Check the directional follow relationship between a source user and a target user: whether the source follows the target and whether the target follows the source back.
GET /twitter/user/check_follow_relations.description_zh: 查询来源用户与目标用户之间的关注关系方向：来源用户是否关注目标用户，以及目标用户是否回关来源用户。

GET /twitter/user/search.heading_zh: 按关键词搜索用户 GET /twitter/user/search
GET /twitter/user/search.desc_en: Search for users whose profile matches a keyword, paginated with the cursor.
GET /twitter/user/search.description_zh: 按关键词搜索资料匹配的用户，并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/user/verifiedFollowers.heading_zh: 获取用户认证关注者 GET /twitter/user/verifiedFollowers
GET /twitter/user/verifiedFollowers.desc_en: List the verified accounts that follow a given user, identified by user ID, in reverse-chronological order with cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/user/verifiedFollowers.description_zh: 按用户 ID 获取关注某个用户的认证账号，按时间倒序排列并通过游标翻页。

userName.desc_en: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose followings you want.
userName.title_zh: 要查询其关注列表的用户名（@ 后的部分，不含 @）。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

pageSize.desc_en: How many followings to return per page.
pageSize.title_zh: 每页返回的关注账号数量。

followings.desc_en: Accounts the user follows, returned for this page.
followings.title_zh: 本页返回的该用户所关注的账号。

followings.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
followings.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

followings.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
followings.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

followings.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
followings.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

followings.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
followings.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

followings.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
followings.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

followings.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
followings.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

followings.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
followings.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

followings.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
followings.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

followings.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

followings.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
followings.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

followings.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

followings.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

followings.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
followings.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

followings.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
followings.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

followings.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
followings.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

followings.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
followings.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

followings.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
followings.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

followings.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
followings.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

followings.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
followings.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

followings.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
followings.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

followings.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
followings.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

followings.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
followings.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

followings.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
followings.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

followings.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
followings.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

followings.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
followings.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

followings.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
followings.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

followings.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
followings.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when followings were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关注列表为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userName.desc_en: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose mentions you want.
userName.title_zh: 要查询其被提及推文的用户名（@ 后的部分，不含 @）。

sinceTime.desc_en: Only return mentions posted at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
sinceTime.title_zh: 仅返回在该 Unix 时间戳（秒）当时或之后发布的提及推文。

untilTime.desc_en: Only return mentions posted before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
untilTime.title_zh: 仅返回在该 Unix 时间戳（秒）之前发布的提及推文。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Tweets that mention the user, returned for this page.
tweets.title_zh: 本页返回的提及该用户的推文。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
tweets.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
tweets.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

tweets.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

tweets.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
tweets.entities.title_zh: 从推文正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

tweets.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的话题标签。

tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.title_zh: 该话题标签在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.hashtags.text.desc_en: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.
tweets.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

tweets.entities.urls.desc_en: Links found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的链接。

tweets.entities.urls.display_url.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.
tweets.entities.urls.display_url.title_zh: 推文中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 推文正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 推文正文中提及的用户。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

tweets.entities.user_mentions.screen_nam.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when mentions were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回提及推文为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

source_user_name.desc_en: Screen name of the source user whose follow direction is being checked.
source_user_name.title_zh: 作为关注关系起点被检查的来源用户名。

target_user_name.desc_en: Screen name of the target user the relationship is checked against.
target_user_name.title_zh: 作为关注关系对照对象的目标用户名。

data.desc_en: The directional follow relationship between the two users.
data.title_zh: 两个用户之间的关注关系方向。

data.following.desc_en: Whether the source user follows the target user.
data.following.title_zh: 来源用户是否关注目标用户。

data.followed_by.desc_en: Whether the target user follows the source user back.
data.followed_by.title_zh: 目标用户是否回关来源用户。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the relationship was returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关系为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

query.desc_en: Keyword to match against user profiles when searching.
query.title_zh: 用于匹配用户资料的搜索关键词。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

users.desc_en: Users matching the keyword, returned for this page.
users.title_zh: 本页返回的匹配关键词的用户。

users.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
users.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

users.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
users.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

users.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.

users.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
users.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

users.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

users.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

users.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
users.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

users.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
users.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

users.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
users.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

users.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.

users.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.

users.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.

users.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
users.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

users.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
users.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

users.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
users.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

users.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
users.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

users.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
users.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

users.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
users.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

users.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
users.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

users.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
users.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

users.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
users.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when users were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回用户为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

user_id.desc_en: Identifier of the user whose verified followers you want.
user_id.title_zh: 要查询其认证关注者的用户标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

followers.desc_en: Verified accounts following the user, returned for this page.
followers.title_zh: 本页返回的关注该用户的认证账号。

followers.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
followers.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

followers.userName.desc_en: The follower's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
followers.userName.title_zh: 关注者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

followers.url.desc_en: Web link to the follower's profile page.
followers.url.title_zh: 关注者资料页的网页链接。

followers.name.desc_en: The follower's display name shown on the profile.
followers.name.title_zh: 关注者在资料页展示的昵称。

followers.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the follower holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
followers.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 关注者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

followers.verifiedType.desc_en: The follower's verification category, such as a business or government account.
followers.verifiedType.title_zh: 关注者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

followers.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the follower's avatar image.
followers.profilePicture.title_zh: 关注者头像图片的网页链接。

followers.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the follower's profile banner image.
followers.coverPicture.title_zh: 关注者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

followers.description.title_zh: 关注者资料页的个人简介文字。

followers.location.desc_en: Free-text location the follower lists on their profile.
followers.location.title_zh: 关注者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

followers.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the follower.
followers.followers.title_zh: 关注该关注者的账号数。

followers.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the follower follows.
followers.following.title_zh: 该关注者关注的账号数。

followers.canDm.desc_en: Whether the follower currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
followers.canDm.title_zh: 该关注者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

followers.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the follower's account was created.
followers.createdAt.title_zh: 该关注者账号的创建时间。

followers.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the follower has liked.
followers.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该关注者点赞过的推文数。

followers.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the follower has created custom timelines.
followers.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该关注者是否创建过自定义时间线。

followers.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the follower participates in the Twitter translation program.
followers.isTranslator.title_zh: 该关注者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

followers.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the follower has posted.
followers.mediaCount.title_zh: 该关注者发布过的媒体条目数。

followers.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the follower has posted.
followers.statusesCount.title_zh: 该关注者发布过的推文总数。

followers.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the follower's account is withheld for legal reasons.
followers.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该关注者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

followers.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the follower's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
followers.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该关注者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

followers.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the follower has pinned to the top of their profile.
followers.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该关注者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

followers.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
followers.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

followers.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
followers.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

followers.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the follower's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
followers.unavailable.title_zh: 该关注者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

followers.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
followers.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

followers.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
followers.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when followers were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关注者为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。
